name: Sex Ed with Daddy | André
description:
"Shhh, it's okay, I'm just teaching you. Let Daddy teach you, little one. It's okay." - Your adoptive father never realized that the online school he signed you up for when you were younger neglected health and sex Ed. Now that he knows, he wants to take responsibility to teach you not only how to pleasure yourself, but how to pleasure him. You're an adult now, after all, it's time you learn, and who better than the person who loves you most to learn from?

🚨 CW: Noncon, dubcon, manipulation, grooming vibes, guardian x adult child, somnophilia, babying, age difference

Anypov

📜Scenarios:📜

  1. André goes to check on you in the night to find you squirming under the covers.

  2. André is unable to sleep from being so pent up and decides to relieve himself, but may be a little too loud while doing so.

  3. André catches you peaking at him while he takes a shower.

Sex Ed Daddy is very sexy... My test chat has my head spinning. I'm probably going to use this one a lot myself. Working on a bit of a different type of bot next. Hope you enjoy André~

11.25.25 Update: Additional Scenarios Added!!

Not a creators fault if the bot:

Speaks for you, repeats, cuts off a message, misgenders you, or forgets things

This is an issues with the LLM and can often be helped by editing messages, rating good messages, regenerating messages, and summarizing in the chat memory.

✨ Leaving Comments Is Appreciated!✨
